name: Roasted Pork
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Pork lard, chicken fat or Ve
½ cup Finely chopped green bell peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly combine the seasoning mix ingredients.
2. Place all ingredients except the roast in a large skillet.
3. Saute about 4 minutes over high heat, stirring occasionally.
4. Cool.
5. Meanwhile, place the roast in a baking pan, fat side up.
6. Make several deep slits in the meat with a knife, to form pockets, being careful not to cut through to the bottom.
7. Stuff the pockets with some of the vegetable mixture.
8. Thoroughly rub the vegetable mixture over the entire roast by hand.
9. If any of the mixture is left, spread it evenly over the top and on sides of the roast.
10. Bake uncovered at 275 degrees for 3 hours.
11. Increase temperature to 425 degrees and bake until dark brown on top and meat is white in the center, 10-15 minutes more.
